title: Flaky Portuguese Cheese Curds Tarts
description: A winey, flaky, and nostalgic Portuguese dish featuring cheese curds, boil, and served best with a side of fresh fruit or a green salad.
instructions: Combine flour, butter, and salt in a food processor until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add cold water until dough comes together in a ball.
Wrap dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a small spoonful of cheese curds in the center of each dough circle.
Fold dough in half over the cheese and press edges to seal.
Brush tops with olive oil and sprinkle with rosemary.
Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
